profile.name: Tabish raza
profile.tagline: I turn ad budgets into pipelines and pipelines into revenue.

about.heading: I read dashboards the way most people read headlines.
paragraphs: For the last 3 years I've sat at the intersection of creative and analytics — the person who can write the hook and defend the CAC in the same meeting.
I've run growth for a Series A fitness app, rebuilt SEO for a skincare brand recovering from a penalty, and managed six-figure monthly ad spend across Meta, Google, and TikTok.
My approach is unglamorous: fix the leaks before you pour in more budget, test one variable at a time, and report numbers the client can act on — not vanity metrics.

services.title: Paid Media
services.description: Meta, Google, and TikTok campaigns built around a measurable funnel — not just impressions.

services.title: SEO & Content
services.description: Technical fixes and content built around what your buyers are actually searching for.

services.title: Social Media Growth
services.description: Grow your brand with engaging content, consistent posting, and data-driven strategies that attract followers and turn them into customers.

services.title: Analytics & Reporting
services.description: Dashboards that show what changed, why, and what to do next — built for founders, not analysts.

testimonials.name: Sara Ahmed
testimonials.quote: He found the technical issues our last two agencies missed and our organic traffic finally started moving in the right direction.

testimonials.name: Daniyal Raza
testimonials.quote: Gave us a straight answer every time — including when a channel wasn't working. That honesty is rare and it saved us real money.

testimonials.name: Meher Iqbal
testimonials.quote: The lifecycle rebuild alone paid for the entire engagement within the first quarter.
